Ra.description: Sixth-density social memory complex that communicated through Carla Rueckert from 1981-1984. Part of the Confederation of Planets.

Don Elkins.description: Physics professor and UFO researcher who asked all questions in the Law of One sessions.

Carla L. Rueckert.description: Deep-trance channel through whom Ra communicated. Referred to as 'the instrument' in sessions.

Jim McCarty.description: Scribe and third member of the L/L Research team during the Ra sessions.

The Confederation of Planets.description: Group of positive social memory complexes working to assist galactic spiritual evolution. Ra is a member.

The Orion Group.description: Negative (service-to-self) group that seeks to dominate and enslave consciousness. Opposes the Confederation.

Yahweh.description: An entity or group that interacted with Earth's early peoples, of mixed polarity. Associated with early Hebrew traditions.

Hatonn.description: Fourth-density social memory complex and member of the Confederation. Frequently channels love/light messages.

Latwii.description: Fifth-density social memory complex and member of the Confederation.

Logoth.description: Negative thought-form or entity generated by intense hatred, described in Ra's discussions of Atlantis.
